title: Bootstrap Components Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of common Bootstrap UI components (Buttons, Alerts, Cards, Modals, Navbars).

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily way to use a Bootstrap component in your HTML?
options: By using the correct HTML structure and specific Bootstrap class names.

questions.question: Which class is the base for any Bootstrap button?
Which component is a versatile container commonly used to house content like images, text, and buttons together?
Do components like Modals and Dropdowns require any JavaScript to function correctly?
options: Yes, they require the Bootstrap JavaScript bundle (bootstrap.bundle.min.js).

questions.question: Which and/or what class would you use to create a success-style alert in Bootstrap?
